title: Zephaire
description:
A 1.21.8 Client Pack for the Zephaire Minecraft Server.

Built for Quality of Life and Optimization Mods.
body:
**Zephaire's Client Pack** is tailored to Minecraft's version **1.21.8.** The mods which make up this pack aims to enhance the player's experience in small ways without taking the experience away from the base game. Whereas there are many customizable features and the ease of adding onto the pack with shaders or texture packs of your own, there are also plenty of optimization features that should allow most, if not all machines to run this pack smoothly.

_It should be noted that this pack is made for the Minecraft Server - Zephaire, however anyone may use and alter this pack at their own discretion and is able to be used with any vanilla server._

**Express Yourself**: Addons for player customization for your models, such as Figura and Customizable Player Models to allow 3D modelers express their creativity and allow them reanimate and redefine how your model looks and feels. Other mods like Cosmetica and Essentials have built in cosmetics for you to choose and show off as you wish! For those that wish to keep a more vanilla feel for themselves, there exists 3D Skin Layers to spice up your style.

**Redefine Exploration**: With mods such as Sounds, Presence Footsteps, and Reactive Music, these three mods alone make Minecraft feel more alive. No need to turn off your music anymore! Other mods such as Xareo's World Map will help you keep progress of your progression, where as small changes such as Falling Leaves and Dense Flowers, Cool Rain, and Drip Sounds makes exploring both the surface and caverns much more satisfying.

**Performance Boosts**: Many culling mods and optimizers that alter how Minecraft's rendering engine such as Better Beds, Fast Items, Entity Culling, and Particle Core all help with ensuring a smooth experience while playing on any server.

**Gameplay Focused**: Other quality of life mods such as Armor Trim Item Fix, AppleSkin, BetterF3 Axolotl and Bucket Fix are just to name a few mods that assist your every day experience. Other mods like Resourcify and Controlling exists as well, Resourcify allows you to pull from a wide database of both shaders and texture packs where as Controlling allows you to search up any keybinds and to show conflicts with ease.

Whether you are a player of our server here on Zephaire or just another user looking to get a client pack that can be used anywhere, we hope that you enjoy using this pack!
